en.text: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7651 {seven (as the sacred full one); also (adverbially) seven times; by implication, a week; by extension, an indefinite number}

senses.gloss_en: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7651 {seven (as the sacred full one); also (adverbially) seven times; by implication, a week; by extension, an indefinite number}
